issue_title: Rich text is broken in read-only documents
issue_body_preview: When a notebook is loaded from the backend in read-only mode, rich text annotations don't appear and the plain text that remains looks corrupted. On inspection, the reason is clear: as a vestige from our JSON-first, rather than Automerge-first, days, loading a document in read-only mode returns only
test_description_zh: 打开一个包含富文本注释（如加粗、斜体、链接等格式）的笔记本文档，以只读模式加载该文档，观察富文本内容的渲染情况。
expected_result_zh: 在只读模式下，笔记本中的富文本注释应正确渲染，显示完整的格式化文本（加粗、斜体、链接等），纯文本内容不应出现乱码或损坏，与编辑模式下看到的内容保持一致。
